scenarios.name: 強多頭 / 突破
scenarios.subtitle: 突破關鍵 · 趨勢向上
scenarios.when: Breakout day, sustained risk-on, broad participation

scenarios.name: 高檔分化
scenarios.subtitle: 指數高檔 · 個股分化
scenarios.when: Index and internals diverge; some sectors strong while leaders or value zone weak

scenarios.name: 震盪整理
scenarios.subtitle: 多空拉鋸 · 等待方向
scenarios.when: Range-bound, no clear direction, bulls and bears stalled

scenarios.name: 回檔修正
scenarios.subtitle: 漲多回檔 · 調整修正
scenarios.when: Healthy pullback in an ongoing uptrend; broad but orderly correction

scenarios.name: 空頭 / 風險升高
scenarios.subtitle: 風險升高 · 保守應對
scenarios.when: Risk-off day, broad selling, VIX spike, systemic risk elevated

scenarios.name: 盤後觀望
scenarios.subtitle: 靜待消息 · 謹慎觀望
scenarios.when: Weekend, pre-event, or waiting day with no clear tape

scenarios.name: 財報週 / 等待
scenarios.subtitle: 財報公布 · 靜待結果
scenarios.when: Major earnings ahead; tape held hostage to results

scenarios.name: AI 主線爆發
scenarios.subtitle: AI 浪潮 · 引領未來
scenarios.when: AI/semi names breaking out specifically as the dominant theme

selectionRule: If two scenarios fit, prefer the one closer to the day's risk posture than the day's price action alone.
